# Diners Club Intermiles Credit Card  

For Diverse Discoveries

### More Benefits Than Ever Before  

Important Information:
  * Dear Customers,   
Intermiles card is phased out. All the existing customers have been notified on SMS/email between Jan-Feb'23 and have been migrated to other cards after 30 days of the notification. Also, effective 1st January,2023 we will be capping the reward offering of InterMiles Credit Cards for payments made by customers as below:
  * Fees: 1% fee will be applicable on Rental transactions from the second rental transactions of the calendar month.
  * 1% mark-up will be applicable on DCC transactions
  * Grocery capping to 1000 Reward points in a month


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/intermiles-diners-club-credit-card#reward "View More")
Exclusive Benefits:
  * 8 InterMiles on every ₹150 spent on retail purchases.
  * Up to 10X reward points on select partner platforms like SmartBuy and weekend dining.
  * Ola cabs, BookMyShow vouchers, TataCliQ vouchers on monthly spends over ₹80,000


Welcome Benefits
  * 2,500 Reward points on card activation & renewal.
  * Complimentary InterMiles Gold membership for the first year, [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.intermiles.com/rewards-program/tiers-recognition/gold). 


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
![ads-block-img](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Additional benefits
### Exclusive Benefits
  * 10,000 InterMiles upon spending ₹20,000 within first 30 days of card set up*.
  * 15,000 InterMiles on total retail spends of ₹1.5 lakh and above, within the first 90 days


![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Travel Benefits
  * ₹2,000 **Flight Discount** vouchers for the first year
  * ₹3,000 **Hotel Discount** vouchers for the first year
  * _Note_
  * Renewal benefits are only applicable on the realisation of the membership fee. [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/intermiles-diners-club-credit-card/diners-club-credit-card.pdf) for terms and conditions.
  * InterMiles once credited to the customer’s InterMiles Account cannot be converted to Reward Points.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/intermiles-diners-club-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### InterMiles Benefits
  * 8 InterMiles on every ₹150 spent on retail spends
  * 16 InterMiles on every ₹150 spent on every flight and hotel booked [here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.intermiles.com/flights).
  * _Note_
  * Only retail purchases above ₹150 qualify for InterMiles.
  * Cash advances, fuel transactions, fees, and other charges do not accrue any InterMiles
  * EasyEMI and e-wallet loading transactions will not accrue InterMiles8 InterMiles on every ₹150 spent on retail spends
  * InterMiles accrued will be reversed if a retail transaction is converted into SmartEMI.   

  * InterMiles accrued for Insurance transactions will have a maximum cap of 2,000 per day.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/intermiles-diners-club-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Etihad Airways Benefits
  * 10% discount* on Etihad Airways Business Class tickets booked [here(opens in a new tab)](http://flights.intermiles.com/). 
  * 5% discount* on Etihad Airways Economy Class tickets booked [here(opens in a new tab)](http://flights.intermiles.com/). 
  * 2.5X bonus InterMiles for Etihad Airways tickets booked [here(opens in a new tab)](http://flights.intermiles.com/). 


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/intermiles-diners-club-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Golf Privileges
  * Unlimited Complimentary golf games at leading courses across India and select courses across the world.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/intermiles-diners-club-credit-card/golf-program.pdf) for international golf courses.
  * Call the concierge on 1800 118 887 | 022 42320226. View details [here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/intermiles-diners-club-credit-card/golf-program.pdf)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/intermiles-diners-club-credit-card "View More")
![Intermiles diners club credit card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Wondering if you are eligible for this card?
For Salaried
  * **Nationality:** Indian national
  * **Age:** Min 21 years & Max 60 years
  * **Income:** Gross Monthly Income > ₹1,20,000


For Self-Employed
  * **Nationality:** Indian national
  * **Age:** Min 21 years & Max 65 years
  * **Income:** Annual ITR > ₹14,40,000


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
[ Know More  ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/intermiles-diners-club-credit-card/eligibility "Know More")
## Documents required for to get you started
Identity proof 
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID
  * Driving licence
  * PAN card
  * Passport size photograph 


Address proof
  * Utility bills (electricity, water, gas, or telephone)
  * Rental agreement
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID


Income proof
  * Salary slips (for salaried individuals)
  * Income Tax Returns (ITR)
  * Form 16
  * Bank statements


## Fees and Charges
Know more about the joining/renewal fees and other charges here.
[Check Now ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/intermiles-diners-club-credit-card/fees-and-charges "Check Now")
## More about the card
  1. ### Card Control via MyCards
  2. ### Domestic Lounge Program
  3. ### Renewal Membership Fee Waiver
  4. ### Fuel Surcharge Waiver
  5. ### Insurance/Comprehensive protection
  6. ### Safe & Secure Transactions
  7. ### Contactless Payment
  8. ### Zero liability on lost Card
  9. ### Revolving Credit
  10. ### Interest-free Credit
  11. ### Cards for your Entire Family
  12. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


###  Card Control via MyCards 
  * MyCards, a mobile-based service platform for all credit card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of the Diners Club Intermiles HDFC Bank Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration & Activation
  * Set up Card PIN
  * Manage card controls like online spends, contactless transactions 
  * View Transactions/Download e-statements
  * Check Reward Points


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Domestic Lounge Program 
  * Unlimited airport lounge access to 1,000+ lounges in India via Exclusive Lounge Program.
  * Visit the [website(opens in a new tab)](https://www.dinersclub.com/clubmembers/airport-lounges) for the list of lounges. [Terms and conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/intermiles-diners-club-credit-card/diner.pdf) apply.


![Card Reward and Redemption](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Renewal Membership Fee Waiver 
  * Spend ₹8 lakh in a year to get a waiver on next year’s annual membership fee.
  * In case of a fee waiver, the member will not receive Flight /Hotel discount vouchers.


![Card Management & Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fuel Surcharge Waiver 
  * 1% **fuel surcharge waiver** at all fuel stations across India on a minimum transaction of ₹400.
  * Maximum waiver capped at ₹1000 every billing cycle. 
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/intermiles-diners-club-credit-card/classification-public.pdf) for details.


![Redemption Limit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Insurance/Comprehensive protection 
  * **Air accident insurance** cover worth ₹2 crore.
  * Emergency overseas hospitalization cover of ₹50 lakh.
  * **Travel** Insurance covers up to ₹55,000 on baggage delay, capped to 10$ per hour restricted to 8 hours.
  * Credit liability cover of up to ₹9 Lakh. [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/intermiles-diners-club-credit-card/rewards-points-program-terms-and-condition.pdf) for details.


![Smart EMI](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Safe & Secure Transactions 
  * DIP your Chip Card at any chip-enabled POS or swipe your card at any non-chip POS (Regular POS).


![Enjoy Interest-free Credit Period](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Contactless Payment 
  * Diners Club Intermiles HDFC Bank Credit Card is enabled* for Contactless Payments at retail outlets.   
(Note: In India, payment through contactless mode is allowed for a maximum of ₹5,000 for a single transaction where you are not asked to input your Credit Card PIN. However, if the amount is higher than or equal to ₹5,000, the Card holder must enter the Credit Card PIN for security reasons. You may check for the Contactless Network Symbol on your card.)


![Zero Lost Card Liability](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Zero liability on lost Card 
  * Available on any fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card if reported immediately to HDFC Bank’s 24-hour Call Centre.


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Revolving Credit 
  * **Lowest Revolving Credit** at an interest rate of 1.99% per month.


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Interest-free Credit 
  * Up to 50 days of free credit period from the date of purchase (subject to the submission of the charge by the Merchant).


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Cards for your Entire Family 
  * Avail up to 3 add-on cards for your immediate family members (over 18 years) to share the joy of owning an **InterMiles Diners Club Credit Card.**
  * Card features are applicable for the Primary Card Holder only and not add-on card holders.


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/intermiles-diners-club-credit-card/mostimp.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  What is an InterMiles Diners Club Credit Card? 
The InterMiles HDFC Bank Diners Club Credit Card is a premium Credit Card that offers exclusive benefits, rewards, and privileges. It allows you to earn InterMiles on your spends and provides access to various travel, lifestyle, and dining benefits. Experience the power of InterMiles (Formerly JPMiles) Now. you can continue to accrue and redeem InterMiles via [www.InterMiles.com(opens in a new tab)](https://www.intermiles.com/)
###  What are the documents required to apply for an InterMiles Diners Club Credit Card?
To apply for an InterMiles HDFC Bank Diners Club Credit Card, you need to submit identity proof (Aadhaar, PAN Card), address proof (latest utility bill, passport), and income proof (latest salary slips for salaried individuals or income tax returns for self-employed individuals).
###  What is the credit limit of an InterMiles Diners Club Credit Card? 
The credit limit of an InterMiles HDFC Bank Diners Club Credit Card depends on various factors such as your income, repayment history, and creditworthiness. The bank will determine the credit limit based on these factors.
